descriptionShort: Article on Winnipeg Jets' AHL franchise arrangement with Moncton Hawks and roster updates for upcoming season.
descriptionLong: The Times-Transcript reports on the Winnipeg Jets' continued commitment to their AHL franchise in Moncton for the 1988-89 season. Jets general manager John Ferguson expresses interest in a long-term deal, while Hawks ownership remains cautious after the previous season's poor performance. Coach Rick Bowness promises a competitive team. The article notes nine players, including Matt Hervey, Ron Wilson, and Bob Essansa, were assigned to Moncton following the Jets' exhibition game against Minnesota.

attribution.headline: Moncton Hawks, Winnipeg Jets Explore Long-Term Arrangement
